title: Extend event-ledger schema with cite_commitments parallel array + cite_contract_policy_activated event type
description: Add structured cite_commitments field to assistant_turn_observed (parallel to cite_ids/cite_tags, index-aligned). Each commitment slot carries operators[]+skip_reason, default empty array for backward-compat. Add new discriminated-union variant cite_contract_policy_activated (marker event, no payload). Mirrors rc.20 cite_tags evolution pattern exactly.

files.target: assistant_turn_observed schema (around L420-L423) + discriminated union union list
files.change: After cite_tags array (L423), insert `cite_commitments: z.array(z.object({ operators: z.array(z.object({ kind: z.enum(['edit','not_edit','require','forbid']), target: z.string() })), skip_reason: z.string().nullable() })).default([])`. Add new event variant `z.object({ event_type: z.literal('cite_contract_policy_activated'), ts: z.number(), session_id: z.string().optional() })` to the discriminated union. Inline-doc the variant per rc.20 cite_policy_activated precedent (idempotent marker, one-time emit gated by bootstrap drift).

Add 4 cases: (1) assistant_turn_observed with non-empty cite_commitments roundtrips; (2) old event without cite_commitments parses with .default([]); (3) cite_contract_policy_activated event roundtrips; (4) commitment operator kind enum rejects unknown kinds (e.g. 'delete' should throw).

implementation: Read packages/shared/src/schemas/event-ledger.ts L411-L580 to confirm current assistant_turn_observed shape and discriminated-union construction pattern.
Define commitmentSchema as nested z.object — operators array (kind enum + target string) + skip_reason nullable string.
Insert cite_commitments field on assistant_turn_observed AFTER cite_tags (preserve index-alignment ordering convention).
Append cite_contract_policy_activated variant to the discriminated union list — pure marker shape mirroring cite_policy_activated.
Add roundtrip test cases per files[].change directive.
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test event-ledger` to confirm all green.

reference.examples: rc.20 TASK-02 added cite_tags + cite_policy_activated variant in same commit; rc.24 replicates structure for cite_commitments + cite_contract_policy_activated.

rationale.chosen_approach: Schema bump with parallel-array + .default([]) for backward-compat. Old events naturally parse as cite_commitments=[].
alternatives_considered: Parse from kb_line_raw at audit time (rejected: rc.20 set precedent for upstream validation)
Object-keyed map cite_commitments: Record<id, {...}> (rejected: breaks parallel-array convention)
decision_factors: Upstream Zod validation rejects malformed commitments at write time
rationale.tradeoffs: Hook parser becomes responsible for shape conformance; mitigated by shared parser lib (TASK-03).

manual_checks: Verify no other consumers of assistant_turn_observed broke (grep cite_tags usage)
success_metrics: event-ledger.test.ts adds ≥4 new cases all passing
Old events without cite_commitments parse via default
Unknown operator kind rejected by Zod
unit: event-ledger.test default empty array on missing field

criteria: event-ledger.ts operator kind enum contains all 4: 'edit','not_edit','require','forbid'
event-ledger.test.ts adds ≥4 new test cases (grep for cite_commitments|cite_contract_policy_activated)
Commit msg: 'feat(rc24): event-ledger cite_commitments + contract marker schema (TASK-01)'
